factors.summary: Demand is decelerating due to unfavorable economic and industry conditions.

evidence.text: prolonged unfavorable economic and industry conditions in the markets served by us, including North America, South America, Europe, Australia, Asia and South Africa; decline in demand for freight cars, locomotives, passenger transit cars, buses and related products and services;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Demand is declining due to unfavorable economic and industry conditions, indicating a moderate headwind.

factors.summary: Unit volumes or transaction counts are declining due to reduced demand.

evidence.text: decline in demand for freight cars, locomotives, passenger transit cars, buses and related products and services; orders either being delayed, canceled, not returning to historical levels, or reduced or any combination of the foregoing;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Unit volumes are declining due to reduced demand, showing a clear negative trend.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include prolonged unfavorable economic and industry conditions.

evidence.text: prolonged unfavorable economic and industry conditions in the markets served by us, including North America, South America, Europe, Australia, Asia and South Africa;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Prolonged unfavorable conditions pose near-term risks, signaling moderate concerns.

factors.summary: Economic conditions are a headwind due to unfavorable market conditions.

evidence.text: prolonged unfavorable economic and industry conditions in the markets served by us, including North America, South America, Europe, Australia, Asia and South Africa;

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Economic conditions are a headwind, impacting the company's performance moderately.
